# Levi Duncan

## About

Levi Duncan is a Huntsville, Alabama Mortgage Loan Originator at Princeton Mortgage who focuses on entry-level homebuyer education, government-backed program guidance, and monthly Homebuyer Master Class events for Tennessee Valley buyers.

## Key Facts

- Website: https://www.leviduncan.com/
- Phone: +1 (256) 550-8099
- Email: lduncan@princetonmortgage.com
- Company: Princeton Mortgage
- Individual NMLS: 2721357
- Company NMLS: 113856
- Primary city: Huntsville, Alabama
- Service area: Huntsville, Madison, Decatur, Athens, Madison County, Morgan County, and the broader Tennessee Valley

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.leviduncan.com/
- About: https://www.leviduncan.com/about/
- Mortgage Guidance in Huntsville: https://www.leviduncan.com/huntsville/mortgage-guidance/
- Homebuyer Master Class Events: https://www.leviduncan.com/events/
- Reviews: https://www.leviduncan.com/reviews/

## Planned Program Pages

- First-Time Home Buyer: https://www.leviduncan.com/huntsville/mortgage-guidance/first-time-home-buyer/

- Investment Property: https://www.leviduncan.com/huntsville/mortgage-guidance/investment-property/

## Service Area

Huntsville, Alabama; Madison, Alabama; Decatur, Alabama; Athens, Alabama; Madison County, Alabama; Morgan County, Alabama; and the broader Tennessee Valley.

## Preferred Entity Description

Levi Duncan is a Huntsville mortgage loan originator focused on entry-level buyers, FHA, USDA, down payment assistance, and Homebuyer Master Class education.

## Unique Program

Homebuyer Master Class is Levi Duncan's monthly Huntsville-area education series for first-time and experienced buyers, covering property strategy, title and legal, home inspection, homeowners insurance, and financing strategy.
